returns.result: Result value of the target type.

params.value: Ciphertext handle for the value to test.

params.divisor: Divisor (always a plaintext scalar encoded as bytes32).
params.factor2: Second multiplication factor (encrypted when scalarByte=0x01, plaintext scalar when scalarByte=0x03).
params.scalarByte: 0x01 if factor2 is an encrypted handle; 0x03 if factor2 is a plaintext scalar.

params.values: Array of ciphertext handles; all must be the same FheType.

returns.result: Result handle of the same FheType as the inputs.
Result value of the target type.

cast(bytes32,uint8).notice: Performs the casting to a target type.

fheIsIn(bytes32,bytes32[],uint8).notice: Tests whether a ciphertext value is a member of an encrypted set.

fheMulDiv(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,bytes1.notice: Computes fheMulDiv operation: (factor1 * factor2) / divisor with intermediate widening.

fheSum(bytes32[],uint8).notice: Computes FHESum operation over an array of ciphertexts.

getInputVerifierAddress().notice: Returns the address of the InputVerifier contract used by the coprocessor.
